summary: Comprehensive testing of GTI Fleet Management System country-scoped dashboard and action logging features. All features working correctly. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright automation.

backend_api_tests: Group Fleet Manager login - returns token and correct role
POST /api/maintenance-requests - submitted_by_id, submitted_by_name, submitted_by_role populated when manager creates on behalf of driver
GET /api/maintenance-requests - includes submitted_by fields in response
/api/dashboard/compliance - Returns summary with compliance_rate, compliant, non_compliant, warning
/api/dashboard/alerts - Returns alerts array with total_count and critical_count
frontend_ui_tests: Group Fleet Manager login redirects to dashboard
Staff Dashboard displays correctly with all stat cards
Country filter dropdown visible for Group Manager (All Countries, Ghana, Liberia, São Tomé)
Pending Accounts section shows users awaiting approval with Approve buttons
Pending Requests section shows maintenance requests count
Compliance Overview section shows compliance_rate, compliant, non_compliant, warning counts
User approval workflow - clicking Approve shows 'User approved!' toast and updates count
Maintenance Requests page - 'Submitted By' column visible
Maintenance Requests page - Role badge (GROUP_FLEET_MANAGER) shown for manager-submitted requests
Maintenance Requests page - 'Self' indicator shown for self-submitted requests

seed_data_creation: Test maintenance requests created with TEST_ prefix to verify submitted_by tracking
context_for_next_testing_agent: All country-scoped dashboard and action logging features tested and working. Key verified features: 1) /api/dashboard/staff returns country-filtered data for Fleet Managers (Group Manager sees all with user_country=null), 2) POST /api/maintenance-requests correctly populates submitted_by_id, submitted_by_name, submitted_by_role when manager creates request on behalf of driver, 3) Frontend MaintenanceRequests.js displays 'Submitted By' column with role badge, 4) Dashboard.js displays compliance data using compliance.summary fields, 5) Country filter dropdown works for Group Fleet Manager, 6) User approval workflow from dashboard works correctly.

country_scoped_staff_dashboard.details: GET /api/dashboard/staff returns country-filtered data. Group Fleet Manager sees all countries (user_country=null), Fleet Managers see only their country.

action_logging_submitted_by.details: POST /api/maintenance-requests populates submitted_by_id, submitted_by_name, submitted_by_role when manager creates request on behalf of driver. Fields are null when driver submits their own request.

frontend_submitted_by_column.details: MaintenanceRequests.js displays 'Submitted By' column. Shows role badge (e.g., GROUP_FLEET_MANAGER) when manager submitted on behalf of driver, shows 'Self' when driver submitted their own request.

dashboard_compliance_display.details: Dashboard.js correctly displays compliance data using compliance.summary.compliance_rate, compliance.summary.compliant, compliance.summary.non_compliant, compliance.summary.warning

country_filter_dropdown.details: Country filter dropdown visible for Group Fleet Manager with options: All Countries, Ghana, Liberia, São Tomé

user_approval_workflow.details: Approve button on dashboard triggers PUT /api/auth/users/{id}/approve, shows success toast, and updates pending count
